changes.what_changed: Fixed RICHARD.md reference in Richard spinup prompt — corrected to REVIEWER.md.
changes.old_behavior: Arch's spinup prompt told Richard to read RICHARD.md, which does not exist. Richard would fail to load his role file.
changes.user_impact: Existing installs must update the Richard spinup line in ARCHITECT.md. Find 'Then read RICHARD.md' and change it to 'Then read REVIEWER.md'.
changes.user_impact_plain: There was a typo in the instructions Arch gives Richard when spinning him up. Richard was told to read a file that doesn't exist. One-word fix in your ARCHITECT.md.
migration_steps: Open ARCHITECT.md in your project root.
Find the Briefing Richard section. Look for the line: 'Then read RICHARD.md, then handoff/REVIEW-REQUEST.md'.

changes.what_changed: Fixed BOB.md reference in Bob spinup prompt for users who installed from the root-level template — corrected to BUILDER.md. The v1.2.4 fix only reached one template path.
changes.old_behavior: Some installs still had 'Then read BOB.md' in the Bob spinup prompt depending on which template they installed from.
changes.new_behavior: Spinup prompt correctly references BUILDER.md across all install paths.
changes.user_impact: If you applied the v1.2.4 migration, check your ARCHITECT.md — if it still says BOB.md, apply the same fix: change it to BUILDER.md.
changes.user_impact_plain: The BOB.md fix from v1.2.4 didn't reach all install paths. If Bob is still failing to load his role file, this is why. Same one-word fix.
migration_steps: Open ARCHITECT.md in your project root.
Find the Briefing Bob section. Look for 'Then read BOB.md'.
If it still says BOB.md, change it to BUILDER.md.
If it already says BUILDER.md, no action needed.

changes.what_changed: Version check upgraded to full procedure — tracks version_notified, fetches release notes, walks migration steps conversationally. Replaces the simplified ping-and-link version.
changes.old_behavior: Version check pinged the API, compared to local VERSION, and dropped a link. No tracking, no migration walkthrough.
changes.new_behavior: Full procedure: reads version_notified from SESSION-CHECKPOINT.md, skips if already notified, fetches releases JSON if newer version found, walks Project Owner through changes and migration steps one at a time.
changes.user_impact: Replace the version check step in your ARCHITECT.md Session Start with the updated procedure from the latest template.
changes.user_impact_plain: The version check now actually walks you through updates instead of just dropping a link. Worth updating — this is what makes the whole system useful.
migration_steps: Open ARCHITECT.md in your project root.

Find the Session Start section. Replace steps 1 and 2 with the updated version from the latest ARCHITECT.md template at https://github.com/russelleNVy/three-man-team/blob/main/templates/project-folder/ARCHITECT.md.

changes.what_changed: Quality improvements across all role files — clearer Job 1 guidance in ARCHITECT.md, explicit REVIEW-REQUEST.md format in BUILDER.md, simplified section title in REVIEWER.md, removed redundant handoff file list from CLAUDE.md.
changes.old_behavior: Minor clarity gaps and redundant content across the role files.
changes.new_behavior: Tighter instructions, less redundancy, no behavior change.
changes.user_impact: No migration required. Pick up the improvements by copying the updated templates into your project if you want them.
changes.user_impact_plain: Minor wording improvements across the role files. Nothing breaks if you stay on your current versions.

arch_opening: I see version {version} of Three Man Team is available. There are two bugs that may be silently breaking Richard and possibly Bob — both are one-word fixes in your ARCHITECT.md. There is also an upgrade to the version check itself. I want to walk you through it before we get into today's work.
